attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks inside final 4km of long gradual climbs, targeting moments where sustained power can gap elite pursuers without terrain being steep enough for pure climbers to immediately close.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Gradual, sustained climbs (15km+ at moderate gradient) where diesel power matters more than explosive acceleration; avoids punchy steep gradients that favor pure climbers.
vulnerability: Unknown how he responds when marked or when attacks are neutralized; single observation shows success but not response to tactical pressure or repeated accelerations.
key_patterns: Attacks with 3-4km remaining on extended climbs to maximize power-to-weight efficiency
Holds consistent tempo under pressure rather than responding with accelerations
Targets stage wins over GC, suggesting focus on opportunistic rather than classification racing
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows breakthrough performance at age 24, but insufficient data to assess trend direction or consistency
